metadata.survey: NFHS-5 (2019-21) India Report, Table 2.11; NFHS-6 (2023-24) national factsheets
metadata.note: NFHS-5 reports air conditioner/cooler as a combined household-possession category, so NSS 78 remains the cleaner source for separate AC and air-cooler ownership. NFHS-6 public factsheets include electricity but not fan, AC, or cooler ownership in the parsed 101 indicators.

title: Households with air conditioner or cooler, rural
